Refactor auth

A short plan document exercising the rendering pipeline.

Goals

  • Replace session cookies with tokens
  • Keep the old legacy login working
  • Ship behind a flag1

Tasks

  • Write the spec
  • Implement the middleware

	fmt.Println("hello")
}

  1. auth_v2 in the flags service. ↩︎

Markdown source

# Refactor auth

A short plan document exercising the rendering pipeline.

## Goals

- Replace session cookies with tokens
- Keep the ~~old~~ legacy login working
- Ship behind a flag[^flag]

## Tasks

- [x] Write the spec
- [ ] Implement the middleware

## Code

```go
func main() {
	fmt.Println("hello")
}
```

```
plain block, no language
```

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Plan --> Review --> Ship
```

## Matrix

| Case     | Result |
| -------- | ------ |
| happy    | pass   |
| sad      | fail   |

> [!NOTE]
> The rollback plan lives at https://example.com/rollback.

[^flag]: `auth_v2` in the flags service.
